• Prime factorization of 45 = 3, 3, 5
• Prime factorization of 90 = 2, 3, 3, 5

Step 2: Identify the common prime factors.

• Since the common prime factors of 30, 45, and 90 are 3 and 5, the GCF is 3 x 5 = 15.
